channel.title: Mallo – Articles & Guides | MalloPal
channel.description: Guides and articles from Mallo, the AI companion app that remembers you: living alone, remote work, new city, loneliness, daily check-in. No signup. Download Mallo for iPhone.

item.title: Best AI companion app that remembers you (2026)
item.description: What to look for: persistent memory, daily check-ins, weekly recap. For living alone, remote work, new cities. How Mallo fits.

item.title: Companion app for living alone – why it helps
item.description: Why a companion app helps when you live alone: daily check-ins, memory, a small ritual. What to look for. Mallo is built for this.

item.title: Is an AI companion right for me? Honest answer & quiz
item.description: Short guide plus free 5-question quiz. For anyone wondering if a daily AI companion fits their life. No signup.

item.title: Loneliness, remote work, and AI companions
item.description: Why loneliness sneaks up on people who live alone or work remotely—and how small rituals, including an AI that remembers you, can help.

item.title: Holiday loneliness: when you're alone or far from family
item.description: Thanksgiving, Christmas, New Year—when the season feels heavy. Practical, human advice without toxic positivity.

item.title: First week in a new city: by region (US, UK, abroad)
item.description: What actually changes when you move in the US, UK, or elsewhere. Paperwork, norms, and one thing that helps everywhere.
